arts.ttl: Real Madrid sharpshooter Kylian Mbappe matches Cristiano Ronaldo total and is now chasing down all-time Los Blancos record
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe equals Cristiano Ronaldo's 33-goal haul from his debut season at Real Madrid with a brace in his team's 3-2 success over Leganes at Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Lunin: “Good results are the most important thing”
arts.sum: It was important to win because we have to keep getting three points in every match. We have another important match in two days, we have to prepare for it and recover quickly”.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes' transfer demand to Man Utd chiefs as Real Madrid plot £90m move
arts.sum: Portugal international Bruno Fernandes and Manchester United may consider their options carefully should Real Madrid come in with a significant bid for the Red Devils' talismanic midfielder

arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid plot record £90m move for Man United star after extensive scouting
arts.sum: Real Madrid have reportedly taken significant steps in their pursuit of Man United captain Bruno Fernandes, as they continue their aggressive approach towards signing top Premier League talent. Having already agreed personal terms with Liverpool’s Trent Alexander-Arnold, the Spanish giants are now setting their sights on Fernandes as part of their long-term midfield succession plan. arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold could snub Real Madrid and stay at Liverpool on one condition
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold could still decide to remain at Liverpool on one major condition according to former defender Stephen Warnock despite expectation England star will join Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “I can’t remember a game in which we haven’t suffered”
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti spoke after the win against Leganes at the Santiago Bernabeu on Saturday. Given what we did in the first half, we didn’t deserve them, but they caught us out on two counterattacks and, without balance, they scored.”

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 3-2 Leganes: Highlights, man of the match, stats as magic Kylian Mbappe hits brace in comeback win at Bernabeu
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe scores twice as Real Madrid come from behind to record a 3-2 victory over Leganes at Bernabeu in La Liga on Saturday night.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 3–2 Leganes: Player Ratings As Kylian Mbappe's Brace Saves Los Blancos' Season
arts.sum: Real Madrid secured a 3–2 victory over Leganés thanks to a brace from Kylian Mbappé and a goal from Jude Bellingham.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Leganes – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Real Madrid can move level on points with leaders Barcelona in La Liga with a victory over Leganes on Saturday evening. The Spanish champions return to action at the Bernabeu against the relegation-threatened visitors. Barcelona moved three points clear after beating Osasuna on Thursday night, increasing the pressure on Carlo Ancelotti’s side. arts.ttl: Real Madrid Predicted Lineup vs. Leganes
arts.sum: Real Madrid are back to La Liga action with a match against Leganés at the Santiago Bernabéu.
